summary: Frontend-only mobile bug-fix verification for iteration_17. All 3 reported mobile bugs (mobile hamburger menu portal fix, /design mobile order, PDP mobile order + collapsibles) PASS. All regressions (desktop mega menu w/ Kit Your Workforce, /api/navigation keys, PDP desktop, smoke tests on portfolio/sports/industries/teams-schools/workwear) PASS.

issues: React hydration warning in console: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' — non-blocking but should be cleaned up. Pre-existing, not related to these 3 bugs.

action_items: (Optional, non-blocking) Fix React DOM warning in DesignYourOwn select/option markup — a <span> appears inside an <option> element, causing hydration warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: BoldLayout.jsx portal fix is correct — overlay confirmed rendered outside <nav> ancestry, bounding-box height = 844px (full viewport). Body scroll lock via useEffect is well-implemented.
DesignYourOwn.jsx order classes (order-1/2/3 vs lg:order-1/2/3) verified — mobile y-coords: right-aside=234, canvas=986, left-aside=1587; desktop x-coords: 32/341/959. Correct on both.
ProductDetail.jsx collapsibles both confirmed closed by default; clicking opens them; title at y=548 on mobile (well above-the-fold under gallery).
test_credentials: Not used — bug fixes are purely client-side rendering, no auth needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration_17 verified 3 mobile bug fixes. Mobile menu now uses createPortal(document.body) to escape backdrop-blur containing block — overlay is full 844px height. Designer right-aside (product picker) renders first on mobile via Tailwind order classes. PDP mobile shows gallery -> title -> buy panel; description-full and size-guide-panel are in <details> collapsibles (closed by default) below the buy panel. Pre-existing non-blocking React warning in /design: <span> inside <option> — should be cleaned up in a future cycle.
rca of the issue: Bug 1 (mobile menu): the parent <nav> uses Tailwind 'backdrop-blur' (backdrop-filter), which creates a CSS containing block, trapping any descendant position:fixed elements within the 64px nav height. Fix: createPortal(overlay, document.body) moves the slide-over outside the nav DOM, allowing position:fixed inset-0 to span the full viewport. Verified with overlay.bounding_box().height === 844 and nav.contains(overlay) === false. Bug 2: addressed via Tailwind order-N / lg:order-N. Bug 3: restructured PDP grid and wrapped the long content in <details>.
